product_overview: StockFlow is a transaction-based warehouse management frontend that tracks inventory via immutable movement records, providing SKU-level traceability, location management, and KPI-driven dashboards. It offers product CRUD, movement registration, audit timelines and a responsive app shell with sidebar navigation.
core_goals: Provide accurate, auditable inventory by computing stock from immutable movements rather than storing inventory counters
Allow warehouse staff to create and review products, locations, and stock movements quickly with minimal friction
Surface operational KPIs and recent activity for fast decision-making via a dashboard
Support traceability with a searchable audit trail for any SKU
Keep the UI responsive and mobile-friendly with a consistent app shell and session-based authentication

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow new users to create an account with name, email and password and be redirected to the dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign Up button to submit -> Redirect to / -> See dashboard KPI cards

Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field (invalid format) -> Fill password input field (too short) -> Click Sign Up button to submit -> See error message on invalid input

Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field (already registered) -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign Up button to submit -> See error message indicating email already in use

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users with email and password and redirect them to the originally requested page or the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> Redirect to / -> See dashboard KPI cards
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (wrong password) -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /login -> Leave email or password empty -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See validation error message

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Display KPI cards (total stock, low stock items, daily movements, active locations), recent activity feed and quick actions to register movements.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View total stock count KPI card -> View low stock items KPI card -> View daily movements KPI card -> View active locations KPI card -> View recent activity list -> Click quick action 'Register Sale' -> Navigate to /movements
Navigate to / -> Click quick action 'Receive Stock' -> Navigate to /movements -> See movement registration dialog available
Navigate to / while unauthenticated -> See redirect to /login -> View login page

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Full CRUD surface for products with SKU, name, description, category and min threshold and client-side status badges computed from movement-based stock.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> View product list in table -> Search products by SKU or name -> Filter products by status -> Click Add Product button to open dialog -> Fill SKU input field -> Fill product name input field -> Fill description input field -> Select category -> Set minimum threshold -> Click submit to create product -> See new product in list with status indicator
Navigate to /products -> Click Add Product button to open dialog -> Fill SKU input field (duplicate SKU) -> Fill product name input field -> Click submit -> See error message about duplicate SKU
Navigate to /products -> Click Add Product button to open dialog -> Leave required fields empty -> Click submit -> See validation error messages

features.name: Stock Movement Registration
features.description: Register inbound, outbound, transfer and adjustment movements; movements are append-only records that drive computed stock.
user_flows: Navigate to /movements -> View movement log in table -> Click Register Movement button to open dialog -> Select product from dropdown -> Select movement type (Inbound) -> Enter quantity -> Select to location -> Enter optional note -> Click submit to register movement -> See new movement at top of movement log

Navigate to /movements -> Click Register Movement button to open dialog -> Select product from dropdown -> Select movement type (Outbound) -> Enter quantity -> Select from location -> Click submit to register movement -> See new negative-signed movement in log
Navigate to /movements -> Click Register Movement button to open dialog -> Leave product unselected or quantity empty -> Click submit -> See validation error message preventing submission

Navigate to /movements -> Click Register Movement button -> Select movement type Transfer -> Enter quantity -> Leave to-location empty -> Click submit -> See validation error requiring both from and to locations for transfer

features.name: Location Management
features.description: Manage warehouse zones and locations (shelf, bin, dock, floor) including capacity and utilization metrics.
user_flows: Navigate to /locations -> View locations list in table -> Click Add Location button to open dialog -> Fill location name input field -> Fill zone input field -> Select location type -> Set capacity -> Click submit to create location -> See new location in list grouped by zone
Navigate to /locations -> Click Add Location button to open dialog -> Leave name or zone empty -> Click submit -> See validation error message
Navigate to /locations -> View a location card -> See capacity and utilization percentage with color-coded utilization

features.name: Audit Trail
features.description: Search by SKU and view a timeline of all movements for full traceability including details and context card for the product.
user_flows: Navigate to /audit -> Enter SKU in search input field -> Click Search button or press Enter -> View product info card with SKU and name -> View timeline of all transactions -> Click a timeline entry -> See transaction details including timestamp, action type, quantity, location path, and notes
Navigate to /audit -> Enter SKU in search input field (non-existent) -> Click Search button -> See 'no results' message or empty timeline and suggestion to verify SKU

features.name: Navigation & Session Management
features.description: Sidebar and top-nav provide primary navigation between pages, mobile sidebar toggling, and user session actions including sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar link 'Products' -> Navigate to /products -> Click sidebar link 'Movements' -> Navigate to /movements -> Click sidebar link 'Audit Trail' -> Navigate to /audit
On mobile viewport -> Click hamburger menu -> Toggle mobile sidebar menu -> See sidebar open as sheet -> Click a navigation item -> Navigate to selected route
On any page -> Click sign out button -> Redirect to /login -> See login page
Attempt to navigate to /products while unauthenticated -> Redirect to /login -> See login page

routes.description: Dashboard with KPI cards and recent activity
User login page with email and password
Audit trail with SKU search and timeline

Click Search button or press Enter
